task_completion.description: Add a boolean column named 'IsDeleted' to the 'Track' table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Track' table opened in design view showing a new column 'IsDeleted' of type Boolean/YesNo, or an ALTER TABLE SQL command being executed.

task_completion.description: Initialize the 'IsDeleted' column to FALSE for all existing records.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an SQL UPDATE command setting 'IsDeleted' to FALSE (or 0) being executed, or a data view of the 'Track' table showing the column populated with FALSE/unchecked boxes.

task_completion.description: Mark all tracks with the Genre 'Metal' as deleted by setting IsDeleted to TRUE.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an SQL UPDATE command setting 'IsDeleted' to TRUE (or 1) for tracks where GenreId is 3 (Metal), or a data view showing TRUE/checked boxes for Metal tracks.
Look for 'ActiveTracks' appearing in the list of Views in the database application.

task_completion.description: The 'ActiveTracks' view shows only tracks where IsDeleted is FALSE.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the SQL definition of the 'ActiveTracks' view containing a WHERE clause like 'IsDeleted = FALSE' (or 0), or the view design window showing this filter criterion.
Look for the agent clicking the 'Save' button, using the File -> Save menu, or closing the application and confirming the save prompt for chinook.odb.

integrity.description: The agent used a database management GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show LibreOffice Base or a similar database tool being used, not just a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent actually executed the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for execution success messages, data changing in the table views, or the save button being clicked in the database GUI.

integrity.description: The agent modified the correct chinook.odb database.
integrity.visual_evidence: The window title or database connection details should indicate that 'chinook.odb' is the active database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The database is located at /home/ga/chinook.odb. The 'Track' table contains exactly 3503 rows. The 'Metal' genre corresponds to GenreId=3 and contains 374 tracks. The target column to add is 'IsDeleted' and the target view to create is 'ActiveTracks'.
